note: Formation-gated My Own Star / Everyone's Star kit (modeled like Rapi:RH). NoB1 (My Own Star): skill1 grants continuous self ATK 40.01% (modeled passive, 'cannot be removed') + team burst CDR 7.48s on Full Burst end; skill2's caster-ATK 35.01% and burst's self Attack Damage 35.2% are gated to this status. HasB1 (Everyone's Star): the ATK riders are replaced by re-entering burst at Stage 1 (burstEligibility stage 1); its heal and ally Max-HP portions are dropped (defensive). Formation-independent: team burst-gen 6%, full-charge additional damage 120.13% (per pull, RL always full-charges), Full-Burst-enter Attack Damage 34% and Projectile Explosion Damage 92.03% (text targets 'allies with lower DEF than self' -> approximated as all allies since she is a high-DEF Defender). Burst Shooting Stars modeled as a 40.01% ATK dot every 0.25s for 10s (40 ticks); its 'charge time fixed at 0.7s' modeled as chargeSpeedPct 42.86 (60f/1.0s -> 0.7s at 60fps). Skipped: heals, ally Max-HP, DEF up, Explosion Radius (defensive/AoE-radius, irrelevant vs single boss). UNCERTAIN: Everyone's Star burst re-entry approximated as stage-1 eligibility; 'lower-DEF allies' target simplified to all allies. CORRECTION: Shooting Stars carry the projectileExplosion flavor (they benefit from Projectile Explosion Damage, incl. her own S2 aura) and, as a rider, never receive core damage.
